name: Frost Vial (Major)
description:
Activate (1 Action) Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals 4d6 cold damage and 4 cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a –15-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. You gain a +3 item bonus to attack rolls.

Effect: Frost Vial
